description: A project manager needs an update on the manufacturing and delivery status of wind turbines for an upcoming project.

nodes.task_description: Query the supplier's portal using the purchase order number to get the status of all components (towers, nacelles, blades).

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the current production milestone for each component.

nodes.task_description: Check the logistics provider's system for the estimated shipping dates and vessel tracking information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides the ETA for all major components to the destination port.

nodes.task_description: Compare the current ETAs against the project construction schedule and flag any potential delays.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies a 2-week potential delay for the blades and highlights the schedule impact.
